# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_backuppolicy (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name of the backup policy.
- `resource_group` (String) The name of the resource group the vault is in.
- `vault_name` (String) The name of the Recovery Services Vault the policy belongs to.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `backup_management_type` (String) Defines the type of resource the policy will be applied to.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `daily_retention_count` (Number) The amount of days to retain backups. Does not apply to Weekly frequency.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `instant_recovery_snapshot_retention` (Number) How many days to retain instant recovery snapshots.
- `policy_type` (String) Defines the type of backup policy
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `schedule_days` (String) List of days to execute the schedule. Does not apply to Daily frequency.
- `schedule_run_frequency` (String) The frequency to run the policy.
- `schedule_run_time` (Number) The hour to run backups. Valid choices are on 24 hour scale (0-23).
- `schedule_weekly_frequency` (Number) The amount of weeks between backups. Backup every *schedule_weekly_frequency* week(s). Azure will default behavior to running weekly if this is left blank. Does not apply to Daily frequency.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Assert the state of the backup policy. Use `present` to create or update a backup policy and `absent` to delete it.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `time_zone` (String) Timezone to apply *schedule_run_time*.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `weekly_retention_count` (Number) The amount of weeks to retain backups.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `location` (String) Location of backup policy.
- `properties` (String) Attributes of the backup policy.
- `type` (String) Type of backup policy.
